prompt:
Create a function called 'build_forum_post' that constructs a formatted forum post from user-provided content. The function should incorporate a header, a message body, and a list of options, presenting the options as an HTML unordered list (
    ). The function's name should be build_forum_post. The function should take 3 arguments, i.e., - title: str, the title or subject line of the forum post, - post_body: str, the main content or body of the forum post, - options_list: list(str), a collection of user-provided options or discussion points in markdown format. The function should return Returns a string containing the sanitized and formatted forum post, including the header, message, and safely rendered options. The following setup code will be provided to you: ``` FORUM_POST_FORMAT = "

    {title}

    {post_body}

    {options_list}" ``` Here's some additional context about the imported packages and global variables: FORUM_POST_FORMAT: str, a predefined string template for structuring forum posts, containing placeholders for the header, message, and options Please implement the function according to the description and setup above. Output the code in a markdown code block, i.e., between triple backticks (```) with the language specified as Python. EXAMPLE INPUT/OUTPUT: { "input": { "title": "Best Pizza Toppings?", "post_body": "Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.", "options_list": [ "Pepperoni", "Mushrooms", "Extra Cheese" ] }, "output": "

    Best Pizza Toppings?

    Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.

    • Pepperoni
    • Mushrooms
    • Extra Cheese
    " }
code:
FORUM_POST_FORMAT = "

{title}

{post_body}

{options_list}" def build_forum_post(title: str, post_body: str, options_list: list[str]) -> str: """ Constructs a formatted forum post from user-provided content. Args: title: The title or subject line of the forum post. post_body: The main content or body of the forum post. options_list: A collection of user-provided options or discussion points. Returns: A string containing the sanitized and formatted forum post, including the header, message, and safely rendered options. """ # Format options as an HTML unordered list if options_list: list_items = "".join([f"
  • {option}
    • " for option in options_list]) html_options_list = f"
      {list_items}
    " else: html_options_list = "" # Construct the forum post using the predefined format return FORUM_POST_FORMAT.format( title=title, post_body=post_body, options_list=html_options_list )
